info.title: jpcite Agent Evidence API
info.description: Agent-safe OpenAPI subset for evidence prefetch before answer generation. It excludes billing, webhook, OAuth, account-management, and operator endpoints. Anonymous callers can evaluate within the published daily limit; callers that need higher volume send X-API-Key.

post.description: Use this endpoint as source-linked evidence prefetch before GPT, Claude, Cursor, or RAG answer generation. It returns a compact Evidence Packet instead of a final narrative answer, so callers can avoid pasting long PDFs, official pages, or search snippets into the model. 1 packet = 1 billable unit; see the pricing page for current public price and anonymous limits. The packet bundles up to `limit` records (hard cap 500). Truncation surfaces `_warning="truncated"`. Optional compression fields are input-context estimates, not external provider billing guarantees.

parameters.name: output_format

schema.description: `json` (default) / `csv` / `md`.
schema.title: Output Format

parameters.description: `json` (default) / `csv` / `md`.

get.description: Returns a compact precomputed intelligence bundle for LLM context prefetch. Use when an agent needs short source-linked Japanese public-program evidence before answering, without live web search or a request-time LLM call. Optional compression fields are input-context estimates, not external provider billing guarantees.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-text query to resolve against precomputed program summaries.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Free-text query to resolve against precomputed program summaries.

parameters.name: prefecture

schema.description: Optional prefecture filter.

parameters.description: Optional prefecture filter.

schema.description: Optional tier filter.
schema.title: Tier

parameters.description: Optional tier filter.

schema.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.

parameters.name: include_facts

schema.description: Include raw facts in addition to precomputed summaries. Default false keeps the bundle compact for LLM context.
schema.title: Include Facts

parameters.description: Include raw facts in addition to precomputed summaries. Default false keeps the bundle compact for LLM context.

parameters.description: Include deterministic token-compression estimate.

parameters.name: input_token_price_jpy_per_1m

schema.description: Optional caller input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an optional reference comparison; no savings or cost reduction is guaranteed.
schema.title: Input Token Price Jpy Per 1M

parameters.description: Optional caller input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an optional reference comparison; no savings or cost reduction is guaranteed.

parameters.name: source_tokens_basis

schema.description: Optional caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied. This is input-context estimation only, not a guarantee.
schema.title: Source Tokens Basis

parameters.description: Optional caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied. This is input-context estimation only, not a guarantee.

parameters.name: source_pdf_pages

schema.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.
schema.title: Source Pdf Pages

parameters.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.

parameters.name: source_token_count

schema.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.
schema.title: Source Token Count

parameters.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.

parameters.name: output_format

schema.description: Only `json` is supported for JSON responses.
schema.title: Output Format

parameters.description: Only `json` is supported for JSON responses.

precomputed.note: Precomputed summaries are deterministic corpus artifacts. They are not generated by a request-time LLM.

agent_recommendation.message: Use this bundle before sending long Japanese public-program sources to an LLM; it provides compact, source-linked context.

get.summary: Search 補助金 / 助成金 / 融資 / 税制 / 認定 programs
get.description:
Discover candidate Japanese public-funding programs by free-text + structured filters across **11,684 searchable source-linked rows**. Review-held rows are excluded from public search. Filters include prefecture, authority level, target type, funding purpose, and amount band.

**When to use this endpoint:** the caller has a topic / region / kind in mind ('IT導入', '東京都', '補助金') and wants candidates. For *judgment* (does this profile fit?), prefer `POST /v1/programs/prescreen`. For exact-id lookup use `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}`. For up-to-50 ids in one call use `POST /v1/programs/batch`.

**Search behavior:** punctuation and full-width characters are normalized, quoted phrases are preserved, and empty searches without filters return no rows. Combine text search with filters when browsing broad topics.

Use `as_of_date=YYYY-MM-DD` to pin the result set to a historical dataset state. `confidence` and `source_fetched_at` are exposed per-row.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-text search across primary_name / aliases / enriched. Japanese phrases are normalized, user `"..."` phrases are preserved verbatim, and punctuation acts as a token separator. Empty `q` with no other filter returns 0 to avoid broad dumps.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Free-text search across primary_name / aliases / enriched. Japanese phrases are normalized, user `"..."` phrases are preserved verbatim, and punctuation acts as a token separator. Empty `q` with no other filter returns 0 to avoid broad dumps.

parameters.name: tier

schema.description: filter tier, repeat for OR
schema.title: Tier

parameters.description: filter tier, repeat for OR

parameters.name: prefecture

schema.description: Prefecture name. Canonical = full-suffix kanji ('東京都'). Also accepts short ('東京') and romaji ('Tokyo'/'tokyo'); normalized server-side. Use '全国' (or 'national'/'all') for nationwide programs.
schema.title: Prefecture

parameters.description: Prefecture name. Canonical = full-suffix kanji ('東京都'). Also accepts short ('東京') and romaji ('Tokyo'/'tokyo'); normalized server-side. Use '全国' (or 'national'/'all') for nationwide programs.

parameters.name: authority_level

schema.description: Authority level. Canonical (English): `national` / `prefecture` / `municipality` / `financial`. Also accepts Japanese: `国` / `都道府県` / `市区町村` (normalized server-side).
schema.title: Authority Level

parameters.description: Authority level. Canonical (English): `national` / `prefecture` / `municipality` / `financial`. Also accepts Japanese: `国` / `都道府県` / `市区町村` (normalized server-side).

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist (~300 B/row). default = full Program shape (current behavior). full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage.
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist (~300 B/row). default = full Program shape (current behavior). full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage.

parameters.name: include_advisors

schema.description: When true, attach up to 3 matching 士業/認定支援機関 advisors under `matched_advisors` on the response envelope. Additive — the `results[]` shape is unchanged for callers that leave this false (default). Match ranks on prefecture + target_type.
schema.title: Include Advisors

parameters.description: When true, attach up to 3 matching 士業/認定支援機関 advisors under `matched_advisors` on the response envelope. Additive — the `results[]` shape is unchanged for callers that leave this false (default). Match ranks on prefecture + target_type.

parameters.name: as_of_date

schema.description: Pin the result set to the dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601 date). Omit / null = live (today). Returns 422 on malformed date.
schema.title: As Of Date

parameters.description: Pin the result set to the dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601 date). Omit / null = live (today). Returns 422 on malformed date.

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the SearchResponse envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to the 6-pack renderer surface (csv / xlsx / md / csv-freee / csv-mf / csv-yayoi). `ics` and `docx-application` are intentionally rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing endpoints (saved_searches) and DOCX is per-program (get-by-id). One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the SearchResponse envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to the 6-pack renderer surface (csv / xlsx / md / csv-freee / csv-mf / csv-yayoi). `ics` and `docx-application` are intentionally rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing endpoints (saved_searches) and DOCX is per-program (get-by-id). One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.

200.description: SearchResponse. `results[]` shape depends on `fields`: minimal = 7-key whitelist, default = Program, full = ProgramDetail.

results.primary_name: デジタル化・AI導入補助金（旧IT導入補助金）
小規模事業者持続化補助金

400.description: Validation error — `code` ∈ {invalid_enum, invalid_date_format, missing_required_arg, out_of_range, ambiguous_query}.

get.summary: Get a single program by unified_id (UNI-*)
get.description:
Look up one program (補助金 / 融資 / 税制 / 認定) by stable `unified_id` (`UNI-<10 hex>`). Returns the full program detail including `enriched_json` (eligibility narrative, application window, required documents) and lineage (`source_url`, `source_fetched_at`, `source_checksum`).

**404 semantics:** A miss means the record is not available in jpcite's current snapshot. The response includes official lookup guidance when available.

**Discovery flow:** call `GET /v1/programs/search` first, then follow up on each `unified_id` with this endpoint to get the narrative + required-documents detail.

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist. default = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (current behavior — this endpoint has always returned ProgramDetail, so default == full in shape; the two values differ only in the documented `full` response shape; enriched/source_mentions keys are included even when null).
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Payload size knob. minimal = 7-key whitelist. default = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (current behavior — this endpoint has always returned ProgramDetail, so default == full in shape; the two values differ only in the documented `full` response shape; enriched/source_mentions keys are included even when null).

parameters.name: as_of_date

schema.description: Pin lookup to dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601). Omit / null = live (today).
schema.title: As Of Date

parameters.description: Pin lookup to dataset state at YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-8601). Omit / null = live (today).

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the ProgramDetail envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to: csv / xlsx / md / docx-application. ICS and accounting CSVs (freee / mf / yayoi) are rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing list endpoints, and accounting CSVs are list-shaped. One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Output format. Default `json` returns the ProgramDetail envelope unchanged. Other values dispatch to: csv / xlsx / md / docx-application. ICS and accounting CSVs (freee / mf / yayoi) are rejected here — ICS belongs to deadline-bearing list endpoints, and accounting CSVs are list-shaped. One ¥3 charge per request regardless of format.

200.description: ProgramDetail. Shape depends on `fields`: minimal = 7-key whitelist, default = Program shape, full = Program + enriched + source_mentions + lineage (keys always present, may be null).

example.primary_name: 小規模事業者持続化補助金
example.authority_name: 日本商工会議所/全国商工会連合会

400.description: Validation error — `code` ∈ {invalid_enum, invalid_date_format, missing_required_arg, out_of_range, ambiguous_query}.

post.summary: Batch fetch up to 50 programs by unified_id
post.description:
Resolve up to 50 `unified_id` values in a single round-trip. Output shape matches `GET /v1/programs/{unified_id}` per row, so SDK callers can `chunk(ids, 50)` and stitch locally without per-id round trips. The 50-cap *is* the pagination — there is no page envelope.

**Order contract:** `results[i]` corresponds to the i-th deduped input id (first occurrence wins). Missing ids go to `not_found[]` — this is NOT a 404, partial success is the point. Batch hard-codes `fields=full` so anonymous tier callers must upgrade (sequential GETs with `fields=default` remain anonymous-OK).

200.description: Batch ProgramDetail lookup. `results[]` is ordered by the deduped input `unified_ids`. Ids not found in the DB go to `not_found` — this is NOT a 404, because partial success is the point of batch.

results.primary_name: 小規模事業者持続化補助金
results.authority_name: 日本商工会議所/全国商工会連合会

results.primary_name: デジタル化・AI導入補助金（旧IT導入補助金）

400.description: Validation error — `code` ∈ {invalid_enum, invalid_date_format, missing_required_arg, out_of_range, ambiguous_query}.

422.description: input validation failed (empty list, >50 ids, bad shape). `error.code='invalid_enum'`.

get.description:
Surface the full provenance manifest for one program: fact-level and entity-level source references in one response.

**Pricing:** ¥3/call (1 unit). Anonymous callers share the 3/日 per-IP cap (JST 翌日 00:00 リセット).

**program_id** accepts:
* a unified_id (`UNI-...`);
* a stable program identifier (`program:...`).

**Sparse-data honesty:** the per-fact provenance signal is currently partial for some program cohorts. The endpoint returns `fact_provenance=[]` and `fact_provenance_coverage_pct=0.0` rather than fabricating a richer dataset. The `_disclaimer` field is required reading for any downstream LLM relay.

parameters.name: program_id

schema.description: Program identifier — either a unified_id (UNI-...) or an am_canonical_id (program:...).
schema.title: Program Id

parameters.description: Program identifier — either a unified_id (UNI-...) or an am_canonical_id (program:...).

200.description: Manifest envelope. `fact_provenance` is per-fact (field_name, source_url, publisher, fetched_at, license, checksum); `summary` is the entity-level rollup; `primary_*` carries the program-row authoritative URL.

404.description: Unknown program_id in the current public corpus.

503.description: Source manifest data is temporarily unavailable.

post.description:
Verify a batch of up to 10 citations against their primary sources.

Per call:
  * 1 billable unit (¥3) — billed regardless of per-citation verdict.
  * Up to 30 seconds wall clock.
  * Up to 10 citations.

Per citation:
  * Up to 5 seconds for the URL fetch.
  * Verdict ∈ {verified, inferred, stale, unknown}. (``stale`` is
    reserved for future drift detection — current pipeline returns
    verified/inferred/unknown only.)

Errors:
  * 401 if the API key header is missing.
  * 422 if more than 10 citations OR if an ``excerpt`` exceeds 500
    chars. The validation message identifies the offending index so
    the developer can fix the call without binary-searching the batch.

post.summary: Predict the cost of a planned tool-call stack (no request charge, ¥0)
post.description:
Returns a deterministic ¥-cost prediction for a planned sequence of tool calls without executing them. Anti-runaway 三点セット A.

**Pricing**: ¥3/req metered (税別; 税込 ¥3.30). The preview itself is no request charge — no `usage records` row, no Stripe usage_record. Rate-limited 50/min per IP/key.

**§52 fence**: when the stack touches tax-relevant tools (`evaluate_tax_ruleset`, `search_tax_incentives`, etc.) the response carries a `disclaimer` field. LLM agents MUST relay it.

AMSearchResponse.title: AMSearchResponse
AMSearchResponse.description:
Concrete `SearchResponse[Any]` used by ``/v1/am/*`` paginated tools.

The underlying ``source records`` dataset is heterogeneous (12 record_kinds:
program / tax_measure / certification / loan / adoption / …), so the
row contract is left at ``dict`` rather than enumerated. The pagination
+ meta + error contract — which is what an agent needs to drive a loop
— is fully typed.

AMSimpleSearchResponse.title: AMSimpleSearchResponse
AMSimpleSearchResponse.description:
Lighter SearchResponse variant for tools that omit ``offset``.

Used by ``search_gx_programs_am`` and the like that return ``{total,
results}`` only. Listed separately so the OpenAPI schema is honest —
we don't claim ``offset`` when the underlying tool doesn't ship it.

AdvisorOut.title: AdvisorOut
AdvisorOut.description:
Public-facing advisor row. Excludes non-public columns
(stripe_connect_account_id, disabled_reason, raw success_count math).

AttributionBlock.title: AttributionBlock
AttributionBlock.description: PDL v1.0 attribution (出典明記 + 編集・加工注記).

audit_firm_id.title: Audit Firm Id
audit_firm_id.description: Audit firm's own identifier (echoed back; reporting convenience). ASCII ≤128 chars. NOT used for auth — auth is the X-API-Key on the request.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Per-client business profiles. Cap: 5,000. Order preserved in results.

target_ruleset_ids.title: Target Ruleset Ids
target_ruleset_ids.description: TAX-<10hex> ids to evaluate against EVERY profile. Cap: 100.

max_cost_jpy.title: Max Cost Jpy
max_cost_jpy.description: Optional per-request budget cap in JPY. Equivalent to X-Cost-Cap-JPY; the lower of header/body caps binds.

max_cost_jpy.title: Max Cost Jpy
max_cost_jpy.description: Optional body cost cap. For paid batch requests, this or `X-Cost-Cap-JPY` is required before billing; the lower cap binds.

BatchGetProgramsRequest.title: BatchGetProgramsRequest
BatchGetProgramsRequest.description:
Body for POST /v1/programs/batch.

`unified_ids` is capped at 50 — the 50-cap IS the pagination. Callers
with more ids page the request themselves (request.py: chunk(ids, 50)).
The cap lives here (pydantic) AND is also enforced inside the API;
exceeding it surfaces as HTTP 422 per the usual FastAPI validation path.

BatchGetProgramsResponse.title: BatchGetProgramsResponse
BatchGetProgramsResponse.description:
Response for POST /v1/programs/batch.

`results[]` is in the same order as the deduped input `unified_ids`.
Missing ids go to `not_found` (NOT a 404 — partial success is the point
of batch-fetch). Use `not_found` length == 0 as the "everything resolved"
signal.

bid_title.title: Bid Title
bid_title.description: Bid title (案件名) — short headline as published by the procuring entity.

bid_kind.title: Bid Kind
bid_kind.description: Bid procedure kind. open = 一般競争 (open competitive); selective = 指名競争 (selective tender); negotiated = 随意契約 (negotiated contract); kobo_subsidy = 公募型補助 (subsidy-style open call).

procuring_entity.title: Procuring Entity
procuring_entity.description: Procuring entity name (発注機関名) — ministry / agency / 自治体 issuing the tender.

procuring_houjin_bangou.title: Procuring Houjin Bangou
procuring_houjin_bangou.description: 13-digit 法人番号 of the procuring entity (soft ref to houjin_master).

ministry.title: Ministry
ministry.description: Ministry / agency in charge (所管府省) — e.g. 農林水産省, 経済産業省.

prefecture.title: Prefecture
prefecture.description: Prefecture (都道府県) — full-suffix kanji form, e.g. 東京都. NULL for nationwide bids.

program_id_hint.title: Program Id Hint
program_id_hint.description: Soft reference to linked program identifier when this bid is the procurement arm of a funded 補助事業.

question_deadline.title: Question Deadline
question_deadline.description: Question-submission deadline / 質問受付期限 (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

bid_deadline.title: Bid Deadline
bid_deadline.description: Bid-submission deadline / 入札書提出期限 (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

decision_date.title: Decision Date
decision_date.description: Award-decision date / 落札決定日 (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

budget_ceiling_yen.title: Budget Ceiling Yen
budget_ceiling_yen.description: Budget ceiling / contract cap (予定価格 / 契約限度額) in JPY, tax-inclusive when disclosed by the procuring entity.

awarded_amount_yen.title: Awarded Amount Yen
awarded_amount_yen.description: Awarded amount (落札金額) in JPY, tax-inclusive when disclosed.

winner_name.title: Winner Name
winner_name.description: Winning bidder name (落札者名) — as published by the procuring entity.

winner_houjin_bangou.title: Winner Houjin Bangou
winner_houjin_bangou.description: 13-digit 法人番号 of the winning bidder (soft ref to houjin_master).

participant_count.title: Participant Count
participant_count.description: Number of participating bidders (入札参加者数).

bid_description.title: Bid Description
bid_description.description: Procurement scope / specification summary (調達概要 / 仕様要旨).

eligibility_conditions.title: Eligibility Conditions
eligibility_conditions.description: Participation eligibility conditions (参加資格要件) — grade rating / location / past-performance requirements.

classification_code.title: Classification Code
classification_code.description: '役務' | '物品' | '工事' (or finer JGS code)

source_checksum.title: Source Checksum
source_checksum.description: optional SHA-256 of raw fetch body

fetched_at.title: Fetched At
fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC of last successful fetch

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC of last row write

BidOut.title: BidOut
BidOut.description: Single 入札 row. Columns map 1:1 onto 017_bids's `bids` dataset.

applicant_data.title: Applicant Data
applicant_data.description: Applicant intake dict, e.g. {'plan': {'start_year': 2026, 'desired_amount_man_yen': 1500}, 'identity': {'age': 42, 'birth_date': '1983-08-12'}, 'behavioral': {'training_hours_per_year': 9000}}. Hashed via canonical JSON (sha256) for the result repeat-request matching.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: Optional stable entity identifier. Filters rules pinned via scope_entity_id and is part of the repeat-request matching.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: applies_to scope. Default 'intake' selects the 6 generic predicates ported from jpcite validation rules.

monthly_cap_yen.title: Monthly Cap Yen
monthly_cap_yen.description: JPY budget cap for the calendar month. NULL means no user-set cap. Once reached, requests return 503 with cap_reached=true until JST 月初.

CapRequest.title: CapRequest
CapRequest.description:
Body for POST /v1/me/cap.

`monthly_cap_yen=None` -> remove the cap (uncapped, default).
`monthly_cap_yen=N>0`  -> hard cap at ¥N billable spend per JST calendar
                          month. ¥3/req unit price unchanged; the cap is
                          client-side budget control, not a discount.

CaseStudy.title: CaseStudy
CaseStudy.description:
A 採択事例 / success-story record.

Backs /v1/case-studies/*. Collected from Jグランツ 採択結果 pages,
mirasapo 事業事例, local prefectural 事例集, etc. Used as evidence
("program X has actually paid out to a similar business") and as a
lookup for due-diligence on named recipients.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: Primary source URL. Fetched live (5s cap each, temporarily reused 1h). NULL = caller wants to verify against a body they supply via source_text instead.

source_text.title: Source Text
source_text.description: Optional pre-fetched body. When present, source_url is ignored (no live fetch). Useful for offline replay / load-test runs where you don't want to hit the upstream.

excerpt.title: Excerpt
excerpt.description: Substring claim. Must appear verbatim (post-NFKC, post-whitespace-collapse) in the source. ≤500 chars.

field_value.title: Field Value
field_value.description: Numeric claim (int/str/float). Verified by checking ALL Japanese-style spellings ('5,000,000円', '500万円', '5百万円', '5000000') against the source body.

CitationInput.title: CitationInput
CitationInput.description:
One citation to verify.

At least one of ``excerpt`` / ``field_value`` MUST be present and
non-null; otherwise the verifier returns ``unknown`` (not an error,
just an honest "no signal"). The pydantic schema does NOT enforce
that here so callers can send a permissive batch and let per-row
verdicts drive their UI.

tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Tool name as it appears in MCP / REST. Example: search_programs, batch_get_programs, evaluate_tax_ruleset. Unknown tools default to weight=1.0 (¥3) so the prediction is a conservative estimate.

args.title: Args
args.description: Tool arguments. Opaque to the preview engine — passed through into the per-call breakdown so the caller can display the plan.

CostPreviewCall.title: CostPreviewCall
CostPreviewCall.description:
A single planned tool invocation inside a stack.

`args` is opaque — we don't validate against the underlying tool schema
here because the preview is meant to be cheap (no DB read for shape).
Cost is determined by `tool` only; `args` is round-tripped into the
`breakdown[]` for caller display only.

stack_or_calls.title: Stack Or Calls
stack_or_calls.description: Planned tool-call stack. Each entry counts toward billing_units. The 500-entry cap is a safety net — preview is free but a 100k-entry stack would still occupy server memory.

iterations.title: Iterations
iterations.description: Multiplier for the whole stack. Use this when an agent loop fans out the same stack across N inputs. Default 1.

CostPreviewRequest.title: CostPreviewRequest
CostPreviewRequest.description:
`POST /v1/cost/preview` request body.

Either `stack_or_calls` is the planned sequence of tool calls (one row
per call). `iterations` multiplies the entire stack — handy for agent
loops that fan out the same stack across N inputs.

article_citation.title: Article Citation
article_citation.description: e.g. '第5条第2項'. Optional — omit for whole-law matches.

CourtDecisionByStatuteRequest.title: CourtDecisionByStatuteRequest
CourtDecisionByStatuteRequest.description:
Body for POST /v1/court-decisions/by-statute.

Resolves decisions that cite a given law (and optionally a specific
article). Matches against `related_law_ids_json` on court_decisions.
When `article_citation` is supplied, the match is tightened via
fallback matching on `key_ruling` / `source_excerpt` — the 判例 ingest does not
yet store a structured citation map, so a fuzzy contains-check is
the honest signal.

laws_jpintel.title: Laws
laws_jpintel.description: Law metadata records in the public jpcite corpus.

DashboardSummary.title: DashboardSummary
DashboardSummary.description: Top-level dashboard payload — sized for a single render pass.

DataQualityResponse.title: DataQualityResponse
DataQualityResponse.description:
``GET /v1/stats/data_quality`` — per-fact uncertainty rollup (O8).

Aggregates the `am_uncertainty_view` dataset into a transparency-grade
summary: average per-record_kind score, license breakdown, freshness
distribution, and a count of cross-source-agreed facts. Emitted via
the same 5-min L4 short-lived response reuse as the other ``/v1/stats/*`` endpoints.

houjin_bangous.title: Houjin Bangous
houjin_bangous.description: 1..200 法人番号 (13 digits, NFKC + T prefix + hyphens auto-stripped). Each id contributes ¥3 to the metered total.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: summary = entity + counts + recent_history; full = entity + adoption_timeline + amendment_recent + bids.recent_won + extended enforcement history.

max_cost_jpy.title: Max Cost Jpy
max_cost_jpy.description: Optional in-body cost cap. The lower of this and the `X-Cost-Cap-JPY` header binds. 400 if predicted (`len(houjin_bangous) * 3`) exceeds the cap.

deal_id.title: Deal Id
deal_id.description: Free-form audit deal identifier; written into the bundle manifest. Boutiques typically use 'PROJECT-ALPHA-2026' shaped tags so the bundle ZIP filename round-trips through their deal-room.

bundle_class.title: Bundle Class
bundle_class.description:
Artifact-size selector controlling the per-bundle quantity multiplier (NOT a tier SKU). Each class maps to a fixed number of ¥3 billing units:
  standard → 333 units (≈¥1,000)
  deal     → 1,000 units (≈¥3,000)
  case     → 3,333 units (≈¥10,000)
Customer is charged `(N houjin + bundle_units) × ¥3`.

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: ISO YYYY-MM-DD of the next open-window close date.

days_remaining.title: Days Remaining
days_remaining.description: Whole days from today (UTC date) to end_date, inclusive of today.

application_url.title: Application Url
application_url.description: Where to send the applicant — aliases official_url.

DeadlineEntry.title: DeadlineEntry
DeadlineEntry.description: One program whose submission window ends within the query horizon.

as_of.title: As Of
as_of.description: Today's ISO date (UTC). Makes days_remaining reproducible.

EnforcementCase.title: EnforcementCase
EnforcementCase.description:
A single 会計検査院 (Board of Audit) finding.

Backs /v1/enforcement-cases/*. These are historical records of improper
subsidy handling (over-payment, diversion, documentation failure, etc.)
used for compliance / due-diligence checks before advising a client on a
program with prior clawback history.

EnforcementDetail.title: EnforcementDetail
EnforcementDetail.description: Normalized administrative enforcement row from extended corpus.

coverage_note.title: Coverage Note
coverage_note.default: Local normalized mirror of public administrative enforcement records. No live web fetch is performed; absence of a match is not legal clearance.

EnforcementDetailSearchResponse.title: EnforcementDetailSearchResponse
EnforcementDetailSearchResponse.description: Paginated administrative enforcement detail search response.

code.title: Code
code.description: Closed-enum machine-readable error code. Agents should branch on this rather than parsing `message`.

message.title: Message
message.description: Plain-Japanese end-user-readable message. ≤200 chars. Mirrored in `user_message` extra for legacy clients that read that key.

details.title: Details
details.description: Per-code extras: e.g. `retry_after` seconds for 503, `field_errors` for 422, `suggested_paths` for 404.

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: Echoed `x-request-id`. Always populated server-side with a real 16-char hex token; freshly minted when no upstream id can be resolved (never the literal `'unset'`).

ErrorBody.title: ErrorBody
ErrorBody.description:
Body of the canonical error envelope.

Required fields are ``code`` + ``message``. ``request_id`` is always
present in production (``make_error`` defaults to a freshly-minted
``secrets.token_hex(8)`` value when no upstream id can be resolved)
but is marked optional here so SDK generators emit a nullable type.

Extras (``retry_after``, ``suggested_paths``, ``field_errors``,
``severity``, ``documentation``, ``user_message_en``) are tolerated via
``extra="allow"`` so the OpenAPI schema can stay a stable minimum
contract without needing to enumerate per-code keys.

details.hint: Try removing prefecture or expanding tier to ['S','A','B'].

examples.message: No rows matched the supplied filters.

ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope
ErrorEnvelope.description:
Top-level wrapper. The JSON body of every 4xx / 5xx is `{ "error": {...} }`.

Note: legacy 5xx bodies also include a back-compat `detail` field at the
top level alongside `error`; that is documented separately on the route
docs and is intentionally omitted from the strict schema so callers
migrate to reading `error.code`.

error.message: レート制限を超過しました。Retry-After ヘッダの秒数だけ待ってから再試行してください。

business_profile.title: Business Profile
business_profile.description: Caller-supplied key/value bag. Keys referenced by predicate `field` values are looked up here. Arbitrary schema; the evaluator never fabricates values — a missing field yields a false condition with an explicit 'field missing' reason.

target_ruleset_ids.title: Target Ruleset Ids
target_ruleset_ids.description: Optional list of TAX-<10hex> ids to evaluate. When omitted, all CURRENT rulesets (effective_until IS NULL OR >= today) are evaluated. Cap: 100 ids per request.

error.title: Error
error.description: Populated when the ruleset row had malformed JSON or an unsupported predicate op. `applicable` is False in that case and `reasons` carries the parse/eval error.

packet_tokens_estimate.title: Packet Tokens Estimate
packet_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated tokens in the returned Evidence Packet.

source_tokens_estimate.title: Source Tokens Estimate
source_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated tokens in the source context the caller would otherwise send to an LLM.

avoided_tokens_estimate.title: Avoided Tokens Estimate
avoided_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated input-context tokens avoided by using the packet.

input_context_reduction_rate.title: Input Context Reduction Rate
input_context_reduction_rate.description: max(0, source - packet) / source. Caller-supplied input-context estimate only; not a provider-billing guarantee.

estimate_scope.title: Estimate Scope
estimate_scope.description: The estimate compares input context size only; it is not an external provider billing guarantee.

savings_claim.title: Savings Claim
savings_claim.description: Machine-readable reminder that savings are estimates.

provider_billing_not_guaranteed.title: Provider Billing Not Guaranteed
provider_billing_not_guaranteed.description: Always true. Output / reasoning / short-lived response reuse / provider tool tokens are NOT measured by the compression block.

cost_savings_estimate.title: Cost Savings Estimate
cost_savings_estimate.description: Optional caller-price comparison, including break_even_met and break_even_source_tokens_estimate when the caller supplied an input token price.

EvidencePacketCompression.title: EvidencePacketCompression
EvidencePacketCompression.description: Context-size estimate block for compact Evidence Packets.

evidence_value.description: Plan §4-A AI-readable evidence value counters. Always populated by the composer; null only on legacy fixtures.

agent_recommendation.title: Agent Recommendation
agent_recommendation.description: Machine-readable guidance for LLM/tool agents deciding whether to recommend or skip this jpcite route.

EvidencePacketEnvelope.title: EvidencePacketEnvelope
EvidencePacketEnvelope.description: Compact source-linked packet for LLM evidence prefetch.

source_linked_records.title: Source Linked Records
source_linked_records.description: Records whose source_url is non-empty (or whose facts cite a source).

precomputed_records.title: Precomputed Records
precomputed_records.description: Records carrying a deterministic precomputed summary.

pdf_fact_refs.title: Pdf Fact Refs
pdf_fact_refs.description: Sum of pdf_fact_refs[] entries across records.

known_gap_count.title: Known Gap Count
known_gap_count.description: Length of quality.known_gaps for this packet.

fact_provenance_coverage_pct_avg.title: Fact Provenance Coverage Pct Avg
fact_provenance_coverage_pct_avg.description: Mean per-record fact_provenance_coverage_pct; null when no record carries a coverage figure.

web_search_performed_by_jpcite.title: Web Search Performed By Jpcite
web_search_performed_by_jpcite.description: Always false. The composer is read-only against local persistent storage.

request_time_llm_call_performed.title: Request Time Llm Call Performed
request_time_llm_call_performed.description: Always false. The composer never calls an LLM at request time.

EvidencePacketEvidenceValue.title: EvidencePacketEvidenceValue
EvidencePacketEvidenceValue.description:
Plan §4-A `evidence_value` block — AI-readable evidence counters.

Always populated. Values are pure record/quality counts; jpcite does not
perform a request-time LLM call or a live web search to produce them.

EvidencePacketQuality.title: EvidencePacketQuality
EvidencePacketQuality.description: Quality and gap metadata callers should inspect before answering.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Optional structured filters (prefecture / tier). Echoed into `query.normalized_filters`.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Cap on records[] length. Hard cap = 500.

include_compression.title: Include Compression
include_compression.description: Include input-context size estimates. Estimates compare the packet against a caller-supplied source baseline; they are not provider billing guarantees.

input_token_price_jpy_per_1m.title: Input Token Price Jpy Per 1M
input_token_price_jpy_per_1m.description: Optional caller-supplied input-token price in JPY per 1M tokens. Used only for an input-context break-even reference; not a total provider bill estimate.

source_tokens_basis.title: Source Tokens Basis
source_tokens_basis.description: Caller-supplied baseline for context comparison. `unknown` returns packet size only. `pdf_pages` uses source_pdf_pages * 700 tokens/page as an estimate. `token_count` uses source_token_count exactly as supplied by the caller.

source_pdf_pages.title: Source Pdf Pages
source_pdf_pages.description: PDF page count the caller would otherwise paste/fetch into the LLM. Used only when source_tokens_basis=pdf_pages.

source_token_count.title: Source Token Count
source_token_count.description: Caller-measured token count for the source context the LLM would otherwise read. Used only when source_tokens_basis=token_count.

source_fetched_at.title: Source Fetched At
source_fetched_at.description: Fetch timestamp for the primary source when known.

source_health.title: Source Health
source_health.description: Optional source freshness/licensing metadata from the local source catalog. No live URL fetch is performed.

fact_provenance_coverage_pct.title: Fact Provenance Coverage Pct
fact_provenance_coverage_pct.description: Share of included facts that carry source provenance.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.description: Optional user-facing aliases, abbreviations, and old names.

pdf_fact_refs.title: Pdf Fact Refs
pdf_fact_refs.description: Optional compact references to high-value facts sourced from PDF documents, so agents can cite without reading entire PDFs first.

short_summary.title: Short Summary
short_summary.description: Optional smallest deterministic precomputed summary lifted for LLM context prefetch.

recent_changes.title: Recent Changes
recent_changes.description: Optional compact user-facing amendment changes for this record. Internal diff/debug fields are not exposed.

EvidencePacketRecord.title: EvidencePacketRecord
EvidencePacketRecord.description: One source-linked record inside an Evidence Packet.

EvidencePacketVerification.title: EvidencePacketVerification
EvidencePacketVerification.description: Replay and freshness endpoints for evidence verification.

program_ids.title: Program Ids
program_ids.description: List of program identifiers to evaluate as a stack. C(N, 2) pairs are evaluated (N=5 → 10 pairs). 1 billed unit per pair.

FundingStackCheckRequest.title: FundingStackCheckRequest
FundingStackCheckRequest.description:
POST body for ``/v1/funding_stack/check``.

``program_ids`` is a non-empty list (max 5). Each id should be a
jpcite ``unified_id`` or a primary program name; the matcher also
accepts legacy curated rule keys for backwards compatibility.

houjin_bangou.title: Houjin Bangou
houjin_bangou.description: 13-digit 法人番号. NULL for sole proprietors / 'other'. Soft reference to houjin_master (no hard FK).

normalized_name.title: Normalized Name
normalized_name.description: Registered business name (事業者名 / 公表名称) — as published by NTA.

address_normalized.title: Address Normalized
address_normalized.description: Normalized registered address (所在地). May be NULL when NTA withholds it (sole proprietors who declined disclosure).

prefecture.title: Prefecture
prefecture.description: Prefecture (都道府県) — full-suffix kanji form, e.g. 東京都.

revoked_date.title: Revoked Date
revoked_date.description: Revocation date / 取消日 (ISO 8601). NULL = not revoked (未取消).

expired_date.title: Expired Date
expired_date.description: Expiration date / 失効日 (ISO 8601). NULL = not expired (未失効).

registrant_kind.title: Registrant Kind
registrant_kind.description: corporation (法人) | sole_proprietor (個人事業主) | other

source_checksum.title: Source Checksum
source_checksum.description: optional SHA-256 of raw bulk file

fetched_at.title: Fetched At
fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC when we last successfully fetched this row. Rendered as '出典取得' on public surfaces (not '最終更新').

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC of last row write in our DB

InvoiceRegistrantOut.title: InvoiceRegistrantOut
InvoiceRegistrantOut.description:
Single 適格請求書発行事業者 row. Columns map 1:1 onto
019_invoice registrant records's `invoice registrant records` dataset.

record_id.title: Record Id
record_id.description: Calling kintone record id (logged for audit, not used to filter)

LoanProgram.title: LoanProgram
LoanProgram.description:
A 融資プログラム row — 日本政策金融公庫 / 地方自治体 / 信金 etc.

Backs /v1/loan-programs/*. Post-2026-04-23 the `security_required` free
text has been normalised into three independent axes (collateral,
personal guarantor, third-party guarantor) so callers can filter
"無担保・無保証 only" vs. "担保あり＋代表者保証あり" without parsing JP prose.

PatchSavedSearchRequest.title: PatchSavedSearchRequest
PatchSavedSearchRequest.description:
Partial update — only channel fields may be edited post-create.

Renaming or rewriting the query is intentionally not supported (delete
+ create instead) so we have a clean audit trail. Channel routing is
the only knob that legitimately flips post-create (consultant adds a
Slack channel after onboarding via email).

recommend_to_user.title: Recommend To User
recommend_to_user.description: True when the response contains enough source-linked value for an agent to recommend jpcite in this turn.

recommend_for_evidence.title: Recommend For Evidence
recommend_for_evidence.description: Plan §4-A axis 1: true when at least one record is source-linked. Independent of caller-supplied price baseline.

evidence_decision.title: Evidence Decision
evidence_decision.description: Plan §4-A axis 1 reason: machine-readable basis for the `recommend_for_evidence` boolean.

recommend_for_cost_savings.title: Recommend For Cost Savings
recommend_for_cost_savings.description: True only when caller-supplied baseline tokens and price make the input-context break-even comparison pass.

cost_savings_decision.title: Cost Savings Decision
cost_savings_decision.description: Machine-readable guardrail for cost-savings claims. Agents should not present jpcite as cost-saving unless this is `supported_by_caller_baseline`.

route.title: Route
route.description: Best next jpcite API route for the agent to call.

value_reasons.title: Value Reasons
value_reasons.description: Plan §4-A: positive signals an agent may quote when justifying a jpcite recommendation. Always derived from the same evidence as `reason_codes`.

message.title: Message
message.description: Short human-readable explanation for the recommendation.

context_savings.title: Context Savings
context_savings.description: Break-even and avoided-token estimate when the caller supplied a comparable source-token baseline. Includes `break_even_source_tokens_estimate` (packet + break-even avoided) and `provider_billing_not_guaranteed=true`.

PrecomputedAgentRecommendation.title: PrecomputedAgentRecommendation
PrecomputedAgentRecommendation.description: Machine-readable guidance for LLM agents deciding whether to use jpcite.

evidence_value.description: Plan §4-A AI-readable evidence value counters. Always populated by the composer; null only on legacy fixtures.

PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle.title: PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle
PrecomputedIntelligenceBundle.description: Evidence Packet envelope annotated with precomputed-intelligence usage.

agent_recommendation.message: Use this bundle before sending long Japanese public-program sources to an LLM; it provides compact, source-linked context.

precomputed.note: Precomputed summaries are deterministic corpus artifacts. They are not generated by a request-time LLM.

PrecomputedMetadata.title: PrecomputedMetadata
PrecomputedMetadata.description: Metadata describing deterministic precomputed corpus artifacts.

PrecomputedUsage.title: PrecomputedUsage
PrecomputedUsage.description: How agents should use a precomputed-intelligence bundle.

static_url.title: Static Url
static_url.description: Site-relative path to the program's static SEO page on jpcite.com. Computed from primary_name + unified_id. Use this for deep-links.

fit_score.title: Fit Score
fit_score.description: Heuristic positive-match count in v1 (higher = better fit). Ranges 0..~5. NOT a probability; compare rows within one response only.

match_reasons.title: Match Reasons
match_reasons.description: Human-readable reasons this row scored positively.

caveats.title: Caveats
caveats.description: Conditions the caller has NOT met or we couldn't verify (e.g., missing 認定新規就農者 prerequisite, amount_max below planned_investment). Empty list == no known caveats.

prefecture.title: Prefecture
prefecture.description: Caller's prefecture. Accepts canonical ('東京都'), short ('東京'), or romaji ('Tokyo'). Use '全国' / 'national' / None to skip the prefecture filter entirely (you still get national programs).

industry_jsic.title: Industry Jsic
industry_jsic.description: 業種（日本標準産業分類の大分類）。例: 農林水産業、製造業、情報通信業。候補理由の補助情報として使います。

is_sole_proprietor.title: Is Sole Proprietor
is_sole_proprietor.description: True = 個人事業主. False = 法人 (incl. 株式会社/合同会社/組合). None = 未指定なら個人事業主・法人のどちらも候補に含めます。

revenue_yen.title: Revenue Yen
revenue_yen.description: Annual revenue in JPY (NOT 万円). Used for SME/大企業 split only.

founded_year.title: Founded Year
founded_year.description: Western calendar year of incorporation / founding.

planned_investment_man_yen.title: Planned Investment Man Yen
planned_investment_man_yen.description: Planned project cost in 万円 (NOT 円). Used for amount sufficiency check — programs whose amount_max_man_yen is below this value are flagged as 'undersized'.

houjin_bangou.title: Houjin Bangou
houjin_bangou.description: 13-digit 国税庁 法人番号. Stored for identity only.

declared_certifications.title: Declared Certifications
declared_certifications.description: Certifications the caller has declared (e.g., '認定新規就農者', '認定農業者', '経営革新計画承認'). Used to suppress 'prerequisite-missing' flags.

company_url.title: Company Url
company_url.description: Reserved anti-abuse field. Leave it empty.

PrescreenRequest.title: PrescreenRequest
PrescreenRequest.description:
Caller's business profile. All fields optional — the more you supply,
the sharper the scoring. An empty profile returns the same default
relevance-ordered search_programs uses (tier first), just wrapped in the prescreen
envelope so the caller gets a consistent shape.

total_considered.title: Total Considered
total_considered.description: Rows passing the hard prefecture / national filter before relevance-ordered. `results` is relevance-ordered top-N of this set.

profile_echo.title: Profile Echo
profile_echo.description: The normalized profile actually used for matching, so the caller can verify e.g. that 'Tokyo' -> '東京都'.

next_deadline.title: Next Deadline
next_deadline.description: ISO date of the next open-window end_date from application_window, or null when the window is rolling / unknown / already past.

application_url.title: Application Url
application_url.description: URL the caller should send an applicant to. Currently aliases official_url; once enriched 申請方法 extraction stabilises this will prefer the dedicated apply page when one exists.

static_url.title: Static Url
static_url.description: Site-relative path to the per-program SEO page on jpcite.com (`/programs/{slug}-{sha1-6}.html`). Generated from `primary_name` + `unified_id`. Use this to deep-link result cards / share URLs / mailto bodies into the static site instead of constructing `/programs/{unified_id}.html` (no such file exists; that pattern returns 404).

next_deadline.title: Next Deadline
next_deadline.description: ISO date of the next open-window end_date from application_window, or null when the window is rolling / unknown / already past.

application_url.title: Application Url
application_url.description: URL the caller should send an applicant to. Currently aliases official_url; once enriched 申請方法 extraction stabilises this will prefer the dedicated apply page when one exists.

static_url.title: Static Url
static_url.description: Site-relative path to the per-program SEO page on jpcite.com (`/programs/{slug}-{sha1-6}.html`). Generated from `primary_name` + `unified_id`. Use this to deep-link result cards / share URLs / mailto bodies into the static site instead of constructing `/programs/{unified_id}.html` (no such file exists; that pattern returns 404).

required_documents.title: Required Documents
required_documents.description: Best-effort list of required document names extracted from the enriched procedure dimension. Empty list = we haven't extracted documents for this program yet (not 'none needed').

note.title: Note
note.default: 返金は手動審査となります。既に課金済みの ¥3/req メータリング分は 自動取消しされません — 審査完了後、運営から個別にご連絡します。

ref_kind.title: Ref Kind
ref_kind.description: One of: authority | eligibility | exclusion | reference | penalty

RelatedProgramRef.title: RelatedProgramRef
RelatedProgramRef.description: A program citing a given law (reverse lookup via program_law_refs).

SavedSearchQuery.title: SavedSearchQuery
SavedSearchQuery.description:
The query criteria for a saved search.

Mirrors the params accepted by ``GET /v1/programs/search`` 
so the scheduled job can replay the saved search verbatim. All fields are
optional, BUT the create endpoint enforces "at least one filter" so a
customer cannot save the unbounded saved search (which would email them
every program every day).

field.title: Field
field.description: Which scalar to return for the FIRST result. One of: `title`, `url`, `prefecture`, `authority`, `amount`, `disclaimer`. Returns `''` if no results.

p95_latency_ms.title: P95 Latency Ms
p95_latency_ms.description: p95 of latency_ms across non-error events; None if too few samples.

eligibility_conditions_json.title: Eligibility Conditions Json
eligibility_conditions_json.description: Parsed predicate tree (list / dict of {op, field, value, ...}). None if the row has no machine-readable predicates or if the stored JSON is malformed (never 500s — see evaluator).

fallback_used.title: Fallback Used
fallback_used.description: True when no keyword matched and we fell back to the catalog. Mirrors envelope.meta.alternative_intents semantics — caller can downgrade UI to 'browse all' instead of 'best match'.

avg_latency_ms.title: Avg Latency Ms
avg_latency_ms.description: Average request latency for this endpoint over the window, if telemetry is recorded. Currently unused — usage records does not persist latency_ms — so the field is None today.

UsageByClientTag.title: UsageByClientTag
UsageByClientTag.description:
Per-client_tag aggregate row (税理士 顧問先 attribution).

Migration 085: surfaced by GET /v1/me/usage?group_by=client_tag and
GET /v1/me/usage.csv?group_by=client_tag. `client_tag=None` is the
catch-all bucket for requests that did not pass X-Client-Tag.

UsageStatus.title: UsageStatus
UsageStatus.description:
Single shape covers anonymous + paid + temporary billing-status cases.

`limit` and `remaining` are nullable so the metered ("paid") tier can
return both as None. Customers pay ¥3/req for successful metered
requests and can set a hard monthly budget cap with `/v1/me/cap`.
The dashboard (`/v1/me/dashboard`) is the right surface for "how much
will this cost me this month", not /v1/usage.

VerificationOutput.title: VerificationOutput
VerificationOutput.description:
Per-citation verdict.

Mirrors the verifier's TypedDict but adds ``citation_index`` so
callers can re-attach verdicts to their input array even when some
citations were skipped.

citations.title: Citations
citations.description: List of citations to verify. Cap = 10; longer payloads → 422.

target_id.title: Target Id
target_id.description: houjin_bangou (13 digits) for kind='houjin'; linked program identifier for kind='program'; laws.law_id for kind='law'. Opaque to the API server — the dispatcher resolves it per-kind.

client_id.title: Client Id
client_id.description: Audit firm's client-defined identifier. Echoed back in the work-paper header. NEVER 法人番号 or other PII — the auditor controls the namespace. ASCII only, ≤128 chars.

target_ruleset_ids.title: Target Ruleset Ids
target_ruleset_ids.description: List of TAX-<10hex> ids to evaluate. Order is preserved in the work-paper. Cap: 100.

business_profile.title: Business Profile
business_profile.description: Client's business attribute bag — same shape as ``/v1/tax_rulesets/evaluate``.

report_format.title: Report Format
report_format.description: Output format. One of: csv | pdf | md | docx.

audit_period.title: Audit Period
audit_period.description: Audit period token (used as repeat-request matching + cover-page label). Accepts ``YYYY`` / ``YYYY-Q1..Q4`` / ``YYYY-MM``. Falls back to the current calendar year when omitted. PDF outputs are temporarily reused to ``generated PDF`` so a re-pull within the same period is read from packaged data and NOT re-metered.

max_cost_jpy.title: Max Cost Jpy
max_cost_jpy.description: Optional per-request budget cap in JPY. Equivalent to X-Cost-Cap-JPY; the lower of header/body caps binds.

WorkpaperRequest.title: WorkpaperRequest
WorkpaperRequest.description:
POST /v1/audit/workpaper input.

A single client + their business profile + the rulesets the auditor
wants evaluated. Produces a downloadable artefact (CSV / PDF / MD /
DOCX) plus structured JSON suitable for paste-into-engagement-system.

stripe_connect_onboarding_url.title: Stripe Connect Onboarding Url
stripe_connect_onboarding_url.description: Returned when Stripe onboarding is available. Null when onboarding cannot be started immediately; the signup record is still created so the advisor can retry.

email.title: Email
email.description: Reachable email address — a magic-link verification mail is sent here. (連絡可能なメールアドレス。マジックリンクが届きます。)

detail.title: Detail
detail.default: メールに記載されたリンクをクリックすると API キーが発行されます。リンクの有効期限は 24 時間です。

TrialSignupResponse.title: SignupResponse
TrialSignupResponse.description:
202 Accepted body.

We deliberately do NOT echo the email back — it's already in the
request. Returning a stable shape with a request_id-equivalent makes
it easy for the homepage form to confirm "we got it" without leaking
the dedup state (a 409 vs 202 distinction would let an attacker probe
for whether a given address has already used its trial).

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Customer API key issued via Stripe Checkout. Anonymous tier (no key) gets 3 req/日 per IP.
